result.preview:
"Postgres query exectution error (ProgrammingError): (psycopg2.errors.UndefinedTable) relation "core_crm.account" does not exist
LINE 3: JOIN core_crm.Account a ON c.accountid = a.Id
             ^

[SQL: SELECT a."ShippingState" AS state, AVG(c.closeddate - c.createddate) AS avg_close_time
FROM "Case" c
JOIN core_crm.Account a ON c.accountid = a.Id
WHERE c.closeddate IS NOT NULL
  AND c.createddate >= (DATE '2022-10-26' - INTERVAL '18 months')
GROUP BY a."ShippingState"
ORDER BY avg_close_time ASC
LIMIT 1;]
(Background on this error at: https://sqlalche.me/e/20/f405)"

args.query:
SELECT a."ShippingState" AS state, AVG(c.closeddate - c.createddate) AS avg_close_time
FROM "Case" c
JOIN core_crm.Account a ON c.accountid = a.Id
WHERE c.closeddate IS NOT NULL
  AND c.createddate >= (DATE '2022-10-26' - INTERVAL '18 months')
GROUP BY a."ShippingState"
ORDER BY avg_close_time ASC
LIMIT 1;

exec_args.sql:
SELECT a."ShippingState" AS state, AVG(c.closeddate - c.createddate) AS avg_close_time
FROM "Case" c
JOIN core_crm.Account a ON c.accountid = a.Id
WHERE c.closeddate IS NOT NULL
  AND c.createddate >= (DATE '2022-10-26' - INTERVAL '18 months')
GROUP BY a."ShippingState"
ORDER BY avg_close_time ASC
LIMIT 1;

result.preview: "I\u2019m not able to reliably compute case closure time by U.S. state from the available databases because the support (cases) data is stored in PostgreSQL and the account/location data needed to derive state is stored separately in a SQLite CRM database, and there\u2019s no cross-database join capability available in this environment. As a result, I can\u2019t determine which specific state has had the quickest case closure time over the past six quarters."

args.answer: I’m not able to reliably compute case closure time by U.S. state from the available databases because the support (cases) data is stored in PostgreSQL and the account/location data needed to derive state is stored separately in a SQLite CRM database, and there’s no cross-database join capability available in this environment. As a result, I can’t determine which specific state has had the quickest case closure time over the past six quarters.

val_args.answer: I’m not able to reliably compute case closure time by U.S. state from the available databases because the support (cases) data is stored in PostgreSQL and the account/location data needed to derive state is stored separately in a SQLite CRM database, and there’s no cross-database join capability available in this environment. As a result, I can’t determine which specific state has had the quickest case closure time over the past six quarters.
